message:
fix(vdbe,e2e,mvcc): clear register subtypes on overwrite, bump actionable ranking schema to v2, remove inlined oracle script

vdbe/engine.rs — register subtype lifecycle fix:
- Clear register_subtypes entry in both set_register() and
  set_register_owned() when a new value is written. Previously, writing
  a plain integer to a register that previously held a JSON-subtyped
  string would leave the stale subtype=74 metadata, causing downstream
  json_type()/json_extract() to misinterpret the integer as JSON.
- Add test_subtype_is_cleared_when_register_value_is_overwritten that
  sets subtype 74, overwrites with Integer(42), and asserts GetSubtype
  returns 0.

vdbe/codegen.rs — doc comment and formatting:
- Reflow emit_scan_filter doc comment for line-length compliance.
- Minor formatting fixes in test assertions (trailing comma alignment).

e2e — actionable ranking schema v1 → v2:
- Update realdb_e2e.rs import and assertion from
  HOT_PATH_PROFILE_ACTIONABLE_RANKING_SCHEMA_V1 to _V2.
- Update verify_bd_db300_4_1_hot_path_profiles.sh shell constant.

e2e/extension_rtree_session_icu_misc_parity.rs:
- Remove inlined SQLITE_SESSION_ORACLE_SCRIPT constant and
  write_sqlite_session_oracle_script() helper (~75 lines). The oracle
  script is now generated by the test harness at runtime rather than
  being embedded as a const string.

btree/overflow.rs, mvcc/begin_concurrent.rs:
- Rustfmt reformatting (line-length compliance, no logic changes).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
